mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dashboard_employee (employee_id, employee_name, team_name, is_active) VALUES (#{employeeId}, #{employeeName}, #{teamName}, #{isActive})

INSERT INTO dashboard_employee (employee_id, employee_name, team_name, is_active) VALUES (#{employeeId}, #{employeeName}, #{teamName}, #{isActive}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE employee_name = VALUES(employee_name), team_name = VALUES(team_name), is_active = VALUES(is_active)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM dashboard_employee ORDER BY employee_id
